title: Introducing Claude Science (now in beta)
summary: Claude Science is a new research application from Anthropic in public beta that runs analyses, searches scientific databases, and provides reproducible artifacts with full code and environment tracking. It is pre-configured for genomics, single-cell analysis, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics, and integrates with 60+ scientific databases.
writeup: The video introduces Claude Science, a research application from Anthropic now in public beta that runs analyses, searches scientific databases, and produces reproducible artifacts with full code and environment tracking. It arrives pre-configured for genomics, single-cell analysis, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics, and it integrates with more than 60 scientific databases. The emphasis on reproducibility and API integration positions the tool for scientific discovery workflows where tracking code and computing environments matters.
